---
title: "New Dataframes"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
#Dataframe for
```

```{r}
str(all_data_merged)
colnames(all_data_merged)
```

```{r}
if (any(all_data_merged$out.electricity.lighting_garage.energy_consumption_total < 0)) {
  print("There are negative values in the column.")
} else {
  print("There are no negative values in the column.")
}
```

```{r}
negative_column_test <- all_data_merged[all_data_merged$out.electricity.cooling_fans_pumps.energy_consumption_total < 0, ]

negative_column_test
```
